jsonLd.title: Senior Instructional Designer at Vedantu
jsonLd.description:
Vedantu, one of India's leading organizations, is hiring a Instructional Designer for our Indore operations. We offer a competitive salary package along with world-class benefits.

About Vedantu:
Vedantu is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Contribute to school newsletter, blogs, and other publications
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBA from a recognized university
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in CBSE/ICSE Standards
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in Child Psychology
• Proficiency in Pedagogy
• Proficiency in Classroom Management
• Proficiency in Research Skills

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Referral bonus program
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Vedantu!
